title: Battle in the Bay - The Art of the Cocktail
content: Watch local bartenders compete in a cocktail competition at 200 North Beach in Bay St. Louis! Sample creative craft cocktails, enjoy the waterfront atmosphere, and vote for your favorite mixologist. A fun evening out on the Bay St. Louis beachfront.
address: 200 North Beach Blvd., Bay St. Louis, MS 39520

title: Second Saturday Art Walk
content: Explore Old Town Bay St. Louis and the Depot District during the monthly Second Saturday Art Walk! Discover cool deals, fresh meals, and live music as merchants and restaurants offer specials throughout the day. Galleries open their doors, artists demonstrate their craft, and the streets come alive with creativity.
venue: Old Town Bay St. Louis & Depot District
address: Main Street, Bay St. Louis, MS 39520

title: SOUPER Mudfest 2026
content: Purchase a handcrafted soup bowl made by local artists for $25, then fill it with delicious soup from participating Bay St. Louis merchants starting at 2 PM. A beloved community tradition that combines local art with great food. Arrive early for the best selection of one-of-a-kind bowls!
address: 162 Main Street, Bay St. Louis, MS 39520

title: Mississippi Sounds - Songwriters in the Round
content: Celebrate Mississippi Musicians Month with an intimate evening of original music at the Bay St. Louis Little Theatre. Local songwriters perform in the round, sharing stories behind their songs in an up-close acoustic setting. A special showcase of Gulf Coast musical talent.

title: St. Patrick's Day Parade Waveland
content: Waveland celebrates St. Patrick's Day with a festive parade along the beachfront! The parade starts at Bienville Blvd and North Beach Blvd, rolling through Waveland with floats, marching bands, and plenty of green. Bring the family and line up early for the best viewing spots along the route.

title: Arts Alive! BSL
content: Arts Alive is Bay St. Louis' premier two-day art festival in the Depot Arts District! This rain-or-shine event features multiple performance stages, an artist trail with award-winning local talent, interactive MakeSpace demonstrations, The Arts kids zone, delicious food, and live music. A celebration of the vibrant arts community that makes Bay St. Louis special.
address: 301 Blaize Avenue, Bay St. Louis, MS 39520

title: Hancock County Parade of Homes
content: Tour over 35 homes for sale across Hancock County during the annual Parade of Homes! Whether you're looking to buy or just love touring beautiful homes, this self-guided tour takes you through neighborhoods in Bay St. Louis, Waveland, Diamondhead, and beyond. Held during Arts Alive weekend for a full day of exploration.

title: Annual STrEaM'in The Coast
content: A fun day of hands-on Science, Technology, Recreation, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics activities for the whole family! Kids and adults alike can explore interactive STEAM exhibits, participate in workshops, and discover the exciting world of science and technology right here on the Gulf Coast.

title: Inaugural Flower Festival
content: Bay St. Louis welcomes its first-ever Flower Festival — a two-day celebration of spring, flowers, creativity, and wellness! Enjoy blooming flower displays, inspiring art, food trucks, live music, and wellness activities. A beautiful way to welcome spring on the Gulf Coast.

title: Waveland Crawfish Cook-off
content: Teams compete for the Best Crawfish title and other awards at this beloved Waveland tradition! Held on Coleman Avenue, enjoy all-you-can-eat crawfish, live music, and a festive atmosphere. All proceeds benefit the Hancock Resource Center. Kids 10-12 are $10, under 10 free.

title: FAN*FEST 2026
content: The Hancock County Library System hosts FAN*FEST, a free fan convention for all ages! Celebrate your favorite fandoms with cosplay, panels, activities, and more. Whether you're into sci-fi, fantasy, gaming, anime, or comics, there's something for every fan at this community event.
